name: Emily
description:
RadioJoy/RadioDove since I haven't seen much of it

Cute sleeping Emily snuggled close to Alastor!user

I'm new to RadioJoy, and love it so much. I only found out it exists like a few days ago after finding the AlastorCult subreddit

Should I make an Alastor version of any of my x user Al bots? I also plan to make RadioStatic or RadioSilence and StaticMoth eventually. I also am trying a new thing for the personalities so it's way easier to make them (yes, it's copied from the wiki for each character)
creator: SkyylarThePissed
